info.name: E-Commerce API
info.description: A full-featured e-commerce REST API built with Laravel 12.

item.name: Addresses
item.description: Endpoints for managing customer shipping addresses.

request.description: Returns all saved addresses for the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Creates a new address for the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Updates an existing address owned by the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Deletes an address owned by the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Creates a new customer account and returns an access token.
Authenticates a user and returns an access token.
Revokes the current access token.

item.name: Cart
item.description: Endpoints for managing the authenticated customer's shopping cart.

request.description: Returns all cart items for the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Adds a product to the authenticated customer's cart or increases quantity if it already exists. Requires customer role.
Removes a cart item belonging to the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.

item.name: Categories
item.description: Endpoints for browsing and managing product categories.

request.description: Returns all available product categories.

response.body: {"status":"success","message":"","data":[{"id":1,"name":"Electronics","slug":"electronics","description":null},{"id":2,"name":"Apple","slug":"apple","description":null},{"id":3,"name":"Samsung","slug":"samsung","description":null},{"id":4,"name":"Dolores","slug":"dolores","description":"Est voluptatem est accusantium ea illum."},{"id":5,"name":"Unde","slug":"unde","description":"Est commodi molestias eos officia."},{"id":6,"name":"Non","slug":"non","description":"Autem provident debitis cupiditate eveniet saepe et dolorem."},{"id":7,"name":"Sint","slug":"sint","description":"Quod quaerat nobis aut eius illum."},{"id":8,"name":"Esse","slug":"esse","description":"Voluptas aliquid sit numquam assumenda."}]}

request.description: Returns a category with its related products.

request.description: Creates a new product category. Requires admin role.
Updates an existing product category. Requires admin role.
Updates an existing product category. Requires admin role.
Deletes a product category. Requires admin role.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Endpoints for placing orders and managing order workflows.

request.description: Returns orders for the authenticated user based on role visibility (admin, seller, or customer). Requires authentication.
Returns details for a specific order if the authenticated user is allowed to view it. Requires authentication.
Places a new order from the authenticated customer's cart and selected address. Requires customer role.
Updates the status of an order. Requires admin role.

item.name: Products
item.description: Endpoints for browsing and managing products.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of products with filtering and sorting options.
